ItacAcademyItem.Name: Occupati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: See Franchi, Impressioni sceniche, pp. 369, 373. This academy is not listed in Maylender`s research. Publications related to the history of this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include Argomento della muta comedia del sig. Ottaviano Castelli da Spoleti. Recitata in Roma da gli Accademici Occupati nell`anno 1640.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
